title: dysoxylum nutans var. tomentosum
intro: Dysoxylum nutans var. tomentosum, also known as the Toon tree, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dysoxylum nutans var. tomentosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
